title: MEDIATIZED EU: Q Methodology Package
author: Tsuladze, Lia
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
The present document is the   Q Methodology Package   for the Horizon 2020 RIA project “MEDIATIZED EU – Mediatized Discourses on Europeanization and their Representation in Public Perceptions” (grant agreement no 101004534 – Mediatized EU – H2020 – SC6 – Transformations – 2020).   
  The document corresponds to Deliverable 2.5 – Q Methodology Package, a detailed description of the final stage of the qualitative research integrating the quantitative research method, prepared by CSS as a co-lead for WP2.   
  The purpose of the document is to provide an in-depth description of the Q methodology, a quantitative approach that will be integrated with the qualitative research component as an innovative contribution of the participants of the MEDIATIZED EU project to the scholarly literature. The Q methodology package contains a general description of Q methodology, the way the MEDIATIZED EU consortium applies it in the research, the sampling details, the procedures of data collection and analysis, and a list of common and country-specific statements that will be used by each consortium member during the fieldwork.

  The purpose of the document is to provide an in-depth description of the Q methodology, a quantitative approach that will be integrated with the qualitative research component as an innovative contribution of the participants of the MEDIATIZED EU project to the scholarly literature.
